requirement_topic.en: China GB/T 18487 Evidence Versus Tunisia IEC-Route Review
requirement_topic.zh: 中国GB/T 18487证据与突尼斯IEC路径审查
requirement_topic.zht: 中國GB/T 18487證據與突尼西亞IEC路徑審查

summary.en: Where Tunisia project documents request IEC-route EVSE evidence, the target review should be based on the exact IEC 61851 edition, any INNORPI adoption or buyer specification, and the site electrical approval route. A China GB/T 18487 report may be technically relevant but should be translated into a clause-by-clause comparison with stated deviations.
summary.zh: 当突尼斯项目文件要求IEC路径EVSE证据时，目标审查应基于准确的IEC 61851版本、任何INNORPI采标或买方规格，以及现场电气批准路径。中国GB/T 18487报告可能具有技术相关性，但应转换为逐条对照并列明差异。
summary.zht: 當突尼西亞項目文件要求IEC路徑EVSE證據時，目標審查應基於準確的IEC 61851版本、任何INNORPI採標或買方規格，以及現場電氣批准路徑。中國GB/T 18487報告可能具有技術相關性，但應轉換為逐條對照並列明差異。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-23 where DC EVSE is in scope
INNORPI-adopted or project-specified standards where applicable

summary.en: GB/T 18487.1-2023 is the current China baseline for conductive charging-system general requirements, replacing the 2015 edition. China files may also include GB/T 18487.2, GB/T 20234 connector reports, GB/T 27930 DC communication evidence, EMC reports, and factory routine-test records.
summary.zh: GB/T 18487.1-2023是中国现行传导式充电系统通用要求基线，替代2015版。中国资料还可能包括GB/T 18487.2、GB/T 20234连接器报告、GB/T 27930直流通信证据、EMC报告和工厂例行测试记录。
summary.zht: GB/T 18487.1-2023是中國現行傳導式充電系統通用要求基線，替代2015版。中國資料還可能包括GB/T 18487.2、GB/T 20234連接器報告、GB/T 27930直流通信證據、EMC報告和工廠例行測試記錄。

gap.en: Build a dossier index that separates China conformity, IEC technical mapping, connector interface, EMC evidence, installation manual, grid input assumptions, cybersecurity or communications features if present, and Tunisia site-specific approvals. Do not collapse all of these into one 'GB/T compliant' claim.
gap.zh: 应建立资料清单，区分中国符合性、IEC技术映射、连接器接口、EMC证据、安装手册、电网输入假设、如有的网络安全或通信功能，以及突尼斯现场特定批准。不要将这些全部合并为一个“符合GB/T”的声明。
gap.zht: 應建立資料清單，區分中國符合性、IEC技術映射、連接器介面、EMC證據、安裝手冊、電網輸入假設、如有的網路安全或通信功能，以及突尼西亞現場特定批准。不要將這些全部合併為一個「符合GB/T」的聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only to the extent Tunisia law, INNORPI adoption, tender, buyer specification, utility approval, installer sign-off, or project documents require IEC-route evidence
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487.1-2023 evidence is China technical baseline evidence; it is not automatically Tunisia acceptance evidence

source.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation / National Public Service Platform for Standards Information (China)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 18487 evidence is a starting point for Tunisia, not the conclusion. Provide an edition-specific GB/T-to-IEC bridge and keep site approval evidence separate.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T 18487证据是突尼斯项目的起点，而不是结论。应提供按版本区分的GB/T至IEC桥接，并将现场批准证据单独管理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T 18487證據是突尼西亞項目的起點，而不是結論。應提供按版本區分的GB/T至IEC橋接，並將現場批准證據單獨管理。
